CustomField.description: When enabled, NPPatch automatically creates or updates Campaign Member records when Opportunities with a Primary Contact and Primary Campaign Source are created or move to a Closed/Won stage. The Campaign Member Status is determined by the Responded and Non-Responded Status settings. Disabled by default.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Automatically create Campaign Members when Opportunities with a Primary Contact and Campaign Source are created or closed/won.
CustomField.label: Automatic Campaign Member Management
